nasb.text: “Behold, days are coming,” declares the Lord, “when I will make a new covenant with the house of Israel and with the house of Judah,

esv.text: “Behold, the days are coming, declares the Lord, when I will make a new covenant with the house of Israel and the house of Judah,

cnv.text: “看哪！日子快到，我要與以色列家和猶大家訂立新的約。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“看啊，时候将到，我要与以色列家和犹大家另立新约，
